reasoning_chain_text: 1. In Los Angeles crime records from 2010-2019, determine the year with the most vehicle burglaries and record the crime code for that offense.
2. For that year, determine which LAPD area had the most narcotic drug law arrests.
3. Map the LAPD area from step 2 to its numeric area identifier in LAPD stop records.
4. Count 2020 vehicle burglaries for the area identifier from step 3.
original_final_question: Between 2010 and 2019, what year has the highest number of burglaries from vehicles in Los Angeles? In that year, determine which area had the most narcotic drug laws arrests, how many vehicle burglaries occurred in that specific area in 2020? Only report the number of vehicle burglaries. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: In 2010 to 2019 LA crime records, the year with the most BURGLARY FROM VEHICLE incidents -> 2016.
Node 2 depends on node 1: In 2016 arrests, the area with the most Narcotic Drug Laws arrests -> Central.
Node 3 depends on node 2: In LAPD RIPA stop-incident records, Central corresponds to Area ID 1.
Node 4: In Los Angeles crime records, BURGLARY FROM VEHICLE corresponds to crime code 330.
Node 5 depends on nodes 3-4: In 2020 crime records for Area ID 1, incident count where Crm Cd = 330 -> 1220.

ideal_code.intent: From 2010 to 2019, which year has the most Los Angeles incidents with crime description "BURGLARY FROM VEHICLE"?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/crime-data-from-2010-to-2019/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df["DATE OCC"] = pd.to_datetime(df["DATE OCC"], errors="coerce")
answer = (
    df.loc[df["Crm Cd Desc"] == "BURGLARY FROM VEHICLE"]
      .assign(year=df["DATE OCC"].dt.year)
      .loc[lambda x: x["year"].between(2010, 2019, inclusive="both")]
      .groupby("year")
      .size()
      .sort_values(ascending=False)
      .index[0]
)
answer = int(answer)
answer = str(answer)

ideal_code.intent: In <node_1 answer> Los Angeles arrest records, which area has the most arrests in the charge group "Narcotic Drug Laws"?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/arrest-data-from-2010-to-2019/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df["Arrest Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Arrest Date"], errors="coerce")
answer = (
    df.loc[
        (df["Arrest Date"].dt.year == 2016)
        & (df["Charge Group Description"] == "Narcotic Drug Laws")
    ]
    .groupby("Area Name")
    .size()
    .sort_values(ascending=False)
    .index[0]
)

ideal_code.intent: Using LAPD stop-incident records collected under California's RIPA program, what numeric Area ID corresponds to area name <node_2 answer> (answer as an integer)?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/lapd-ripa-ab-953-stop-incident-details-from-7-1-2018-to-present/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

area_id_value = (
    df.loc[df["Area Name"] == "Central", "Area ID"]
      .dropna()
      .iloc[0]
)
answer = int(str(area_id_value).split("/")[0])
answer = str(answer)

import io
import pandas as pd

from botocore.config import Config

ideal_code.intent: Using the 2020 to present Los Angeles crime records, in 2020 how many incidents with crime code <node_4 answer> occurred in Area ID <node_3 answer>?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/crime-data-from-2020-to-present/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df["DATE OCC"] = pd.to_datetime(df["DATE OCC"], errors="coerce")
answer = int(
    df.loc[
        (df["DATE OCC"].dt.year == 2020)
        & (df["AREA"] == 1)
        & (df["Crm Cd"] == 330)
    ].shape[0]
)
answer = str(answer)

ideal_query.intent: In <node_1 answer> Los Angeles arrest records, which area has the most arrests in the charge group "Narcotic Drug Laws"?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT "Area Name" AS answer
FROM t
WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM TRY_CAST("Arrest Date" AS DATE)) = 2016
  AND "Charge Group Description" = 'Miscellaneous Other Violations'
GROUP BY "Area Name"
ORDER BY count(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

ideal_query.intent: Using LAPD stop-incident records collected under California's RIPA program, what numeric Area ID corresponds to area name <node_2 answer> (answer as an integer)?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT CAST("Area ID" AS INTEGER) AS answer
FROM t
WHERE "Area Name" = 'Central'
GROUP BY "Area ID"
ORDER BY count(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

ideal_query.intent: Using the 2020 to present Los Angeles crime records, in 2020 how many incidents with crime code <node_4 answer> occurred in Area ID <node_3 answer>?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT count(*) AS answer
FROM t
WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM TRY_CAST("DATE OCC" AS DATE)) = 2020
  AND AREA = 1
